subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer of musk-laden breath, respected Khadíjih, handmaid of God who is firm in faith, and supplicating leaf, Amatu'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس بامه الله الموقنه خدیجه محترمه و ورقه مبتهله امه الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
